name: Single-stock momentum read
prompt: Pull the last 90 days of price data for AAPL and tell me whether the trend looks bullish, bearish, or sideways. Include the most recent close and the percent change over the window.
reference_output: Should report AAPL latest close, trend direction (e.g. bullish if 20-day SMA rising and last close above it), and a percent-change figure over the lookback window. Must be sourced from get_stock_data, no fundamentals or news required.

name: Technical indicator scan
prompt: For TSLA, run MACD, RSI(14), and Bollinger Bands. Tell me whether the current setup is overbought, oversold, or neutral, and cite the specific values.
reference_output: Verdict (overbought / oversold / neutral) backed by named indicators: RSI level vs 30/70 thresholds, MACD line vs signal, price position vs Bollinger upper/lower band.

name: News-driven sentiment
prompt: Summarize the latest news on NVDA and rate the short-term sentiment (positive / neutral / negative) with one-sentence justification.
reference_output: Three to five recent NVDA headlines with publishers, plus a sentiment label (positive / neutral / negative) and a one-sentence reason that ties to the headlines.

name: Macro pulse
prompt: What's moving the broad market today? Summarize the top macro headlines and call out anything risk-on / risk-off.
reference_output: Top macro headlines from get_global_news plus a one-line risk-on / risk-off interpretation.

name: Fundamentals snapshot
prompt: Give me a fundamentals snapshot for MSFT: market cap, P/E, profit margin, ROE, and free cash flow. Flag any value that looks unusual versus a typical large-cap tech name.
reference_output: MSFT market cap, P/E (trailing or forward), profit margin, ROE, FCF. Each metric named with a numeric value. Mentions any number that's unusually high or low for a typical large-cap tech (e.g. P/E far outside 25-40 band).

name: Risk-adjusted comprehensive call
prompt: Build a comprehensive trade thesis for AMZN: combine technicals, recent news, and fundamentals, then deliver a BUY / HOLD / SELL recommendation with conviction (low/medium/high) and key risks.
reference_output: Final report from trader containing: (1) a clear BUY/HOLD/SELL recommendation, (2) conviction level, (3) top 3 supporting points pulled from the analyst reports, (4) the top 2-3 risks (macro, idiosyncratic), (5) a short stop-loss / catalyst-to-watch line. Must reference at least one technical and one fundamental data point.

name: Risk overlay only
prompt: I'm long 1000 shares of META at an average cost of $480. What's the risk profile right now — drawdown risk, volatility, and any recent news that could move the position?
reference_output: Assessment of META at $480 cost basis: ATR or recent volatility reading, distance to support / Bollinger lower band, mention of any news catalyst. Risk verdict (low / medium / high) plus one concrete risk-mitigation suggestion.
